executor-api/package.json.summary: Package manifest for chatbot executor API with dependencies Express, ESLint, CORS, and Nodemon, scripts for start and dev modes, and engine requirement Node >=18.

executor-api/server.js.summary: A Node.js Express server providing authenticated POST endpoints for syntax checking and linting JavaScript files, using ESLint and a token from environment variable RAILWAY_AUTH_TOKEN.

index.html.summary: HTML entry point for a Self-Recursive Bot React application with mobile-responsive styles, import maps for React, ReactDOM, and Zustand libraries.

netlify.toml.summary: Netlify configuration defining build commands and edge function proxies for DeepSeek, OpenRouter, Firecrawl, LangSearch, executor, and GitHub token endpoints with CORS headers for a specific origin.

keywords.json.summary: JSON index file containing keywords and summaries for each project file (executor-api/package.json, executor-api/server.js, index.html, netlify.toml) for code indexing purposes.

netlify/edge-functions/deepseek-proxy.js.summary: Edge function that proxies POST requests to DeepSeek API for chat completions, supporting both streaming (SSE) and non-streaming responses with error handling.

netlify/edge-functions/executor-proxy.js.summary: Edge function that proxies POST requests to a Railway backend service, dynamically routing to endpoint suffixes and injecting an auth token.

netlify/edge-functions/firecrawl-proxy.j.summary: Edge function that proxies POST requests to Firecrawl search API, returning a structured list of search results with title, URL, snippet, and domain.

netlify/edge-functions/github-token-prox.summary: Edge function that returns a GitHub Personal Access Token from environment variables via a GET request, with CORS support.

netlify/edge-functions/langsearch-proxy..summary: Edge function that proxies POST requests to LangSearch web search API, forwarding the request body and returning the response.

netlify/edge-functions/openrouter-proxy..summary: Netlify edge function that forwards POST requests to OpenRouter's chat completions endpoint with streaming support and error handling.

netlify/inject-preview-bypass.js.summary: Injects a script into index.html during deploy-preview context to hide the login gate and show the root element.

preferences.json.summary: Editable JSON configuration for a self-improving bot defining custom prompt, planning rules, execution code style, and review strictness.

src/components/SimpleChat.js.summary: React component implementing a chat interface with message history, task management, input handling, and toaster notifications.

src/components/SimpleChat/Header.js.summary: Header component for the chat UI showing repository and branch inputs, provider selector, with responsive layout.

src/components/SimpleChat/InputBar.js.summary: InputBar is a React functional component that renders a text input and send button with mobile-responsive styling, handling Enter key to send messages.

src/components/SimpleChat/MessageList.js.summary: MessageList is a React component that renders chat messages with distinct styling for user and agent roles, including auto-scrolling to the latest message and mobile-responsive font sizes.

src/components/SimpleChat/TaskList.js.summary: TaskList is a React component that conditionally renders a scrollable list of tasks with status colors and responsive sizing for mobile and desktop.

src/components/SimpleChat/Toaster.js.summary: Toaster is a React component that displays a fixed-position toast message with a border color indicating error or success, showing nothing if no toast is passed.

src/core/SelfImprover.js.summary: SelfImprover is a class that orchestrates self-improvement runs using hierarchical task decomposition, persistent memory, LLM calls within a 20-second timeout, and integrates with GitHub for creating PRs.

src/core/WorkingMemory.js.summary: WorkingMemory accumulates file summaries, notes, and plan during an agentic run, providing a compact context for LLM prompts.

src/core/agenticExecutor.js.summary: Executes a single task using a read-before-write loop, supporting Aider-style edit blocks with pre-commit quality gate and retry feedback.

src/core/agenticPlanner.js.summary: AgenticPlanner explores a codebase by reading files and deciding next actions to create a hierarchical plan for a given goal.

src/core/chunkedIndexer.js.summary: Builds a keyword index for large repositories by processing files in groups, extracting keywords and summaries, and committing the result as keywords.json.

src/core/clarification.js.summary: Generates clarifying questions with a timeout, and if no user response within 30 seconds, uses the original goal.

src/core/coordinatedPlanner.js.summary: Multi-agent plan creation that groups candidate files by top-level directory, launches parallel exploration agents per directory, and merges summaries into a final plan for coordinated execution.

src/core/fileDiscovery.js.summary: Discovers relevant files by loading a keyword index or scanning filenames, scoring files based on goal keyword matches, and returning top results for further processing.

src/core/hierarchicalPlanner.js.summary: Extends existing planners by decomposing complex goals into sub-goals using an AI decision step, then creating a hierarchical plan with tasks and dependencies.

src/core/keywordIndexer.js.summary: Indexes slash commands and provides fuzzy matching using Levenshtein distance to find the best command match for user input.

src/core/manifestManager.js.summary: Ensures a manifest.json exists by loading from repo or building from source file contents, providing a project manifest for dependency management.

src/core/parallelExec.js.summary: Executes pending tasks in parallel with a maximum concurrency limit, skipping tasks that conflict with files already being modified.

src/core/persistentMemory.js.summary: Provides functions to save and load WorkingMemory to and from the repository, scoped by a run identifier.

src/core/planner.js.summary: Creates a plan for a given goal by using an LLM to analyze context and generate tasks with file paths.

src/core/prCreator.js.summary: Creates a pull request on GitHub with a title based on the goal.

src/core/reviewer.js.summary: Reviews completed tasks by comparing original and committed files, checking alignment with the goal, and marking tasks as passed or needing rework.

src/core/taskQueue.js.summary: This module initializes and manages a task queue with statuses (TODO, DONE, FAILED) and provides functions to filter pending/done tasks and update task statuses by ID.

src/main.js.summary: Main entry point that initializes services (GitHub, LLM, executor, context builder, agent skills, smoke test, self-improver) and attempts to load GitHub token from Netlify environment if missing.

src/services/PreferencesService.js.summary: Manages user preferences stored as preferences.json in the repository, providing load and save methods with fallback to sensible defaults for agent behavior.

src/services/conversationMemory.js.summary: Provides a localStorage-backed memory object for storing structured cross-run context including goal, phase, decisions, and failed attempts.

src/services/errorIngestion.js.summary: Parses JavaScript stack traces into structured file references and builds a planner-friendly error context string for injection.

src/services/executorApi.js.summary: API client for executor endpoints via Netlify proxy that never exposes secrets to the browser and fails open on network errors.

src/services/github.js.summary: Service class for fetching GitHub repository file trees, loading file content, and committing multiple files using the GitHub API.

src/services/llmProvider.js.summary: Provides a unified interface for language model completions through Netlify proxies with timeout, thinking mode, and fast model override.

src/services/smokeTest.js.summary: Polls a Netlify deploy-preview URL until it renders correctly or times out, with helpers for URL construction and full smoke test.

src/stores/providerStore.js.summary: Zustand state store with persistence for LLM provider settings including model, thinking mode, and reasoning effort.

src/stores/workspaceStore.js.summary: Defines a Zustand store with persistence for workspace state including current repo, branch, GitHub token, and remember keys flag.

src/utils/agentSkills.js.summary: Parses AI replies to extract legacy update_editor blocks and Aider-style SEARCH/REPLACE blocks for safe code edits, along with read_file requests.

src/utils/contextBuilder.js.summary: Builds a prompt context string by selecting target and related files from a manifest, handling imports and importedBy relations, with token budget control.

src/utils/manifestBuilder.js.summary: Builds a dependency graph for JavaScript files by extracting ES module exports/imports and resolving relative import paths.

src/utils/sandboxTest.js.summary: Runs code in a sandboxed iframe with pre-loaded modules to test a SelfImprover instance's health check.

src/utils/searchReplace.js.summary: Defines a SearchReplace class that applies SEARCH/REPLACE blocks to file content using a matching cascade of exact and whitespace-flexible matches, returning detailed errors for the LLM to fix.

src/utils/stripComments.js.summary: Exports a function that removes JavaScript/CSS comments (both block and line) and blank lines to reduce prompt size.
